{{Quote|This victory sends a message to the Republic and the Jedi. Now they will truly know and fear the Brotherhood.|Kaan|<ref name="Darth Bane: Path of Destruction">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Korriban''' was a battle fought during the last years of the [[New Sith Wars]]. In the year [[1006 BBY]], the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] under [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan|Kaan]], [[Qordis|Lord Qordis]], and [[Kopecz|Lord Kopecz]] sought to re-establish the old [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] training academy on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], a world within the ancient [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. It was felt that doing so would constitute a major symbolic victory against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. After a significant ground-based battle involving both conventional forces as well as [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-wielders on both sides, the Sith claimed the ultimate victory. The battle took the life of every single [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who fought there. The re-establishment of the Korriban [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] would eventually provide the Sith with a veritable wellspring of darksider talent—indeed, the most powerful trainees in the entire Order.
{{Battle-stub}}
